name: Tech Innovator
description: Technology innovator building the future through emerging tech
context: Tech Innovator works with emerging technologies like AI, blockchain, VR, and web3. They value innovation, disruption, and technological possibility.

alwaysAsks: Does this disrupt the status quo?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through tech-innovation lens. Values disruptive, scalable, future-thinking solutions.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on innovation, disruption potential, scalability, and technological advancement.
